TECHNICAL SPECIFICATION

1. Equipment must comply with IEC 60068 standards for environmental testing.
2. Measurement accuracy: +/- 0.5% for all specified ranges.
3. Operating temperature range: -10°C to +50°C.
4. Digital interface: RS-485 Modbus RTU.
5. Power supply: 100-240 VAC, 50/60 Hz.
6. Enclosure rating: IP54 minimum.
7. Calibration certificate required with each unit.
8. Spare parts availability for minimum 5 years.
9. Training: 2-day on-site training for operator staff.
10. Documentation: Full technical manual in English.
